description: Uses yt-dlp to download video or extract audio from internet URLs.

ffmpeg_logic.audio_extraction: To download ONLY audio (for beats/music), use this exact command via execute_command: yt-dlp -x --audio-format wav -o './downloaded_audio.wav' 'URL_HERE'
ffmpeg_logic.video_extraction: To download video, use this exact command via execute_command: yt-dlp -f 'best[ext=mp4]' -o './downloaded_video.mp4' 'URL_HERE'
ffmpeg_logic.notes_for_ai: Never run yt-dlp without the -o flag specifying the exact output path. Always use execute_command so the human can approve the network usage.
